title: Require Service Contract Authority
forbids: standalone-service and API-plugin embedded-service module-contract declarations outside imports, private attached Effect errors, and the generic contract anchor; indirect or raw procedure schemas; contract-local envelope staging or type aliases; namespace or mutable TypeBox authority; and detached or incorrectly named schema/type pairs
why: A module contract is a declarative boundary. Direct Standard Schema adaptation and a small positive top-level grammar remove parallel schema, error, and transport-type authority.
remediate: Inline standard(TypeBoxSchema) at each input/output position, move reusable domain schemas to their module model owner as NameSchema values, pair only an actually needed NameType as Static<typeof NameSchema>, define Effect public errors privately in the contract and attach them directly, and remove every other contract-local declaration.
message: Service module contracts must preserve one declarative schema and public-error authority.
